title: Endurance | Stamina
body:
![title](https://i.imgur.com/lcY45Y6.png)

**⚠️ Important Note:** This plugin will no longer receive new features. All new additions will be available exclusively in the Premium version. The free version will continue to receive updates to ensure compatibility with future Minecraft versions and to fix potential compatibility issues.

Scroll down to read more about this decision

![header](https://i.imgur.com/y4YzY8q.png)
![discord button](https://i.imgur.com/Ug2ZYsS.png)
![desc](https://i.imgur.com/MUt10xT.png)

[Donate paypal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/PhilippeCloutier266)

Have you ever dreamed of putting stamina on players on your server? If so, this plugin is for you! This plugin is simple and very easy to learn. This Plugin is inspired by the endurance of the video game Zelda Breath of the wild

_Soft Dependencies (Optional):_

**PlaceHolderAPI (See documentation tabs)

Vault

WorldGuard (add a custom flag)**

CONFIG.yml

```
# ________  _________  ________  _____ ______   ___  ________   ________
#|\   ____\|\___   ___\\   __  \|\   _ \  _   \|\  \|\   ___  \|\   __  \
#\ \  \___|\|___ \  \_\ \  \|\  \ \  \\\__\ \  \ \  \ \  \\ \  \ \  \|\  \
# \ \_____  \   \ \  \ \ \   __  \ \  \\|__| \  \ \  \ \  \\ \  \ \   __  \
#  \|____|\  \   \ \  \ \ \  \ \  \ \  \    \ \  \ \  \ \  \\ \  \ \  \ \  \
#    ____\_\  \   \ \__\ \ \__\ \__\ \__\    \ \__\ \__\ \__\\ \__\ \__\ \__\
#   |\_________\   \|__|  \|__|\|__|\|__|     \|__|\|__|\|__| \|__|\|__|\|__|
#   \|_________|

# VERSION 12.0.0 BY PHIL24K
#if you want to donate on paypal for my work : https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/PhilippeCloutier266
#have fun!

#####################################################
##                     BossBar                     ##
#####################################################

bossbar: true
bossbar-color: GREEN


#####################################################
##                 Upgrade System                  ##
#####################################################

#Enable or not the upgrade system
#This will prevent players from using
#/staminagui
enable_upgrade_system : true

#NOTE:
#Instead of changing the max endurance value for each player,
#The plugin fake it by changing the drain rate when running, jumping or swimming.

#Upgrade value for sprint_drain_rate
# (-0.1 every upgrade)
upgrade_value: 0.1
upgrade_cost: 1000

#minimum sprint drain when **Upgrading**
#Can't go below 0.1
minimum_sprint_drain_rate: 0.1


#####################################################
##             Miscellaneous                       ##
#####################################################

#give infinte stamina for 10sec
#when eating a glow berries
glow-berries-effect: true
GlowBerriesItem: GLOW_BERRIES

#Give +20 stamina every times a player eat foods
EnduranceEatingEnable: true

#disable or not the regeneration particles
RegenerationParticle: true


#####################################################
##             Flight and creative                 ##
#####################################################

#enable or not fly drain
#(creative mode fly or spectator...)
flight_drain: false
creativemode_drain: false


#####################################################
##             Default Settings                    ##
#####################################################

#Max Endurance. If you want more stamina, you should
#change the drain rate default below instead of this value
endurance: 200

#Regen rate stat
regen_rate: 9.0

#sprint drain default stat
sprint_drain_rate: 0.5


#####################################################
##                     Fatigue                     ##
#####################################################

#apply or not slowness when the stamina reach 0
Fatigue: true
FatigueDuration: 5 #in seconds
potion_effect_fatigue: SLOW
ExhaustionParticle: true


#####################################################
##                     Jump                        ##
#####################################################

#-2 stamina everytime
#the player jump
JumpDrain: true
JumpDrainRate: 2

#Jump cancel can produce
#glitch and movement error
jumpCancel: false


#####################################################
##                     Combat                     ##
#####################################################


#Combat drain rate
#Every swing
EnduranceCombat: false
#-2 every hit
swingDrainRate: 2
#Time in seconds
#for mining fatigue (VisualEffect)
CombatFatigue: true
MiningFatigue: 3
#When player received damage
#drain stamina
DrainStamina_onPlayerAttacked: false


#####################################################
##                 Placeholder                     ##
#####################################################

#Check placeholder on the doc tabs on spigot

#NOTE:
#/!\ IF YOU NEED A PLACEHOLDER FOR THE MAXIMUM,
# JUST USE A VALUE LIKE 100. NO NEED FOR A PLACEHOLDER :)

#Custom PlaceHolder setting
PlaceHolderSymbols: "I"
PlaceHolderLength: 10
Color1: "§a"
Color2: "§c"


```



❓ – Stamina Plugin Update

Q: Will the free version of the plugin still be updated?
A: Yes! The free version will continue to receive updates to remain compatible with future Minecraft versions and fix any potential bugs.

Q: Why are new features only in the premium version?
A: Developing and maintaining new features takes a lot of time and effort. By offering a premium version, I can continue improving the plugin and support its long-term development.

Q: Will the free version be abandoned?
A: Absolutely not. The free version will still be maintained for stability and compatibility, but it won’t receive new features.

Q: Will my current setup or config break?
A: No. Updates to the free version will remain safe, with no breaking changes unless necessary for Minecraft compatibility.

Q: If I upgrade from the free version to the premium version, will my data, config, and language.yml be safe?
A: No. You will need to reset the Stamina plugin folder. The premium version introduces many changes that are not compatible with the free version's configuration files.



If you find bugs or error to report, don't use the review section.
The Plugin has been tested on PaperMC and Purpur. Any other server jar could not be able to run stamina.
You can join our discord : https://discord.gg/QngnS3mjxd
you can join the discord to suggest idea or new feature!
I will answer you as fast as I can :)



Terms & Conditions
By downloading this plugin you agree to the following Terms & Conditions:
- You can't decompile this plugin without author permision.
- You can't claim this plugin as your own!
- You can't post it on other website without asking me. (yt is fine but give credits)
- Only use this plugin on your server/network.
- You can't steal code from the plugin
- This Terms & Conditions can be updated at any time.
